name: MantelMount MM815 (Bond Bridge) by IntegrateIT
notes: PTZ-style control of a MantelMount MM815 motorized TV mount over Bond Bridge — nudge, drive-to-limit, true hold-to-move, six favorites, and TV-follow (auto Deploy/Stow with TV power). Bond auto-discovery + health, position state variables/events, per-controller licensing, and over-the-air updates.
